title: Laundry Scent Boosters Beads - Washing Machine Laundry Freshener - Pink Orchid Scent - Long Lasting Fabric Freshener 230g
features: Laundry Boosta Balls Pink Orchid Scent 230g

VIBRANT AND REFRESHING - Elevate your laundry routine with these laundry booster, a vibrant and refreshing way to infuse your clothes with long-lasting fragrance. These in-wash scent boosters are designed to deliver a delightful burst of floral freshness, leaving your laundry smelling irresistibly clean and luxuriously soft, wash after wash.

PINK ORCHID FRAGRANCE - Infused with a sophisticated pink orchid scent, these booster balls provide a soft, floral aroma that lingers on fabrics long after the wash. Enjoy a refreshing, clean-smelling wardrobe with every load. Use alongside your regular laundry detergent and softener. Formulated to add fragrance without interfering with the cleaning power of your detergent or the softness of your fabric conditioner.

WORKS ON ALL FABRICS - Designed for use in all washing machines, including HE (high-efficiency) models. Safe for use on all types of washable fabrics and ideal for everything from delicates to heavy-duty linens. Perfect for all types of loads, from towels and bedding to everyday wear, Swirly Booster Balls add an indulgent finishing touch that makes your laundry feel extra special.

LASTING FRESHNESS - Each 230g container lasts for up to 17 washes, offering great value and consistent performance. Thats up to 17 chances to boost your laundry with beautiful scent and freshness. For light fragrance, use one capful. For ultimate results, use two capfuls to enjoy a more intense and longer-lasting scent. Easily adjust to suit your preference or the size of the load. Simply measure the desired amount with the included cap and pour directly into the drum before adding clothes. No mess, no measuring guesswork, just freshness with ease.
